title: A Helping Hand
lesson: Helping a friend who needs you makes you both happy.
prompts: Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image into a sunny playground in a green park on a cheerful morning, skipping happily on the soft grass near a sandbox and a set of swings. Medium shot at eye level, the person facing the camera with their face fully visible and a happy smile. Warm natural sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On the same sunny playground in the green park — a sandbox and a set of swings, soft grass, warm morning light — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left in the mid-ground, one hand raised to their cheek in surprise, facing the camera with their face clearly visible and a caring expression. In the right foreground, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} has gently tripped and sits on the grass beside a tipped-over basket, toy blocks spilled across the ground, looking sad. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image on the same sunny playground in the green park — a sandbox and a set of swings, soft grass, warm sunlight — hurrying across on the far left, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a kind, determined expression, reaching out toward a friend. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} sits on the grass beside the spilled basket of toy blocks, looking up hopefully. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On the same sunny playground in the green park — a sandbox and a set of swings, soft grass, warm light — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is on the far left, kneeling to gather the scattered toy blocks back into the basket but with the head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, smiling warmly. {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} sits to the right, watching gratefully. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On the same sunny playground in the green park — a sandbox and a set of swings, soft grass, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a gentle smile, holding out a helping hand. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} stands back up holding the refilled basket of toy blocks, smiling brightly and gratefully. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On the same sunny playground in the green park — a sandbox and a set of swings, soft grass, golden afternoon sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is on the far left, kneeling and stacking toy blocks beside a friend, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a joyful smile. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} kneels and plays with the toy blocks alongside them, both happy together. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
texts: It was a bright morning at the park. You skipped happily past the swings and the sandbox.
Then you saw your friend trip and fall. His basket tipped, and toys spilled everywhere. He looked so sad.
"I'll help you!" you called, hurrying over. Your friend looked up, full of hope.
You knelt down and gathered every toy back into the basket. Your friend smiled to see you help.
You reached out your hand and helped him stand up. "Thank you!" he said, holding his basket again.
Then you played together in the sunshine, laughing and glad. Helping a friend made you both happy.
